content: Phase 1: Backend foundation — plan fields, billing module, webhook, plan dep
Phase 2: Gate Pro features — AI, recurring, templates, free limits, PDF watermark
Phase 3: Frontend — BillingProvider, Pricing page, Billing tab, global Upgrade modal, PlanBadge
Phase 4: E2E test — trial users get Pro access, free users gated correctly, upgrade modal works
POST-MONETIZATION: Build public landing page with 500+ words to fix SEO
POST-MONETIZATION: Verify sitemap on production after redeploy
